demo/pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Spring Boot parent version to a newer patch release.
Change the target Java version property from 17 to 21 to align with the JDK migration.
demo/pom.xml.why_exists: The project is migrating to JDK 21; without this change, the build would target JDK 17, potentially missing JDK 21 features or failing strict compatibility checks if enforced.
